text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>6. Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinergaſſ sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Prideaun A. und N. Testam</TITLE>, in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE> <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. <VOLUME>4. 1I. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME> ā <AUTHOR>Cattenburg</AUTHOR></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE> <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME> <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8º.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Hebr.</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>punctata Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vº.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Bödickers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vº.</FORMAT></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":5,"explanation":"1) Replaced corrupted OCR characters (√ü, √∂, √§, √≤, √†) with their likely intended characters (ſſ, ö, ä, º, ā). 2) Changed <PRIZE>Cattenburg</PRIZE> to <AUTHOR>Cattenburg</AUTHOR> since Cattenburg is the editor/author of Prideaux's work, not a price. 3) Fixed the nested/unclosed BIBL structure: the second BIBL (Sapientia Mos.) contained an opening <BIBL> for \"Bibl.\" without closing the outer one, creating improper nesting. Added a closing </BIBL> after the Sapientia Mos. entry. 4) Ensured all BIBL entries are siblings rather than nested. 5) Preserved all original content semantics while making the XML well-formed."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>6. Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinergaſſ sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Prideaun A. und N. Testam</TITLE>, in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE> <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. <VOLUME>4. 1I. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME> ā <AUTHOR>Cattenburg</AUTHOR></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl.</TITLE> <VOLUME>8r. 70.</VOLUME> <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8º.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Hebr.</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>punctata Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vº.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Bödickers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vº.</FORMAT></BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1) Replaced corrupted OCR characters (√ü, √∂, √§, √≤, √†) with their likely intended characters (ſſ, ö, ä, º, ā). 2) Changed <PRIZE>Cattenburg</PRIZE> to <AUTHOR>Cattenburg</AUTHOR> since Cattenburg is the editor/author of Prideaux's work, not a price. 3) Fixed the nested/unclosed BIBL structure: the second BIBL (Sapientia Mos.) contained an opening <BIBL> for "Bibl." without closing the outer one, creating improper nesting. Added a closing </BIBL> after the Sapientia Mos. entry. 4) Ensured all BIBL entries are siblings rather than nested. 5) Preserved all original content semantics while making the XML well-formed.
